requirements.note: Heian-era. Takako Uro vessel preferred. Treats sky as a tangible surface.

abilities.name: Sky Control
abilities.description: Manipulate sky as solid surface for levitation, cloaking, or distortion.

mechanics.special_effect: Pull atmosphere like a sheet. Distort space like a lens. Indirect hits bypass guards.

abilities.name: Thin Ice Breaker
abilities.description: Shatter sky surface, sending focused shockwave.

mechanics.special_effect: Concentrated extension. Indirect hit bypasses defenses and generates massive force.

domain_expansion.name: Distorted Image of Heaven and Earth
domain_expansion.description: Multi-layer sky shatter domain. Infinite spatial distortions crush everything inside.

mechanics.special_effect: Infinite ice-like sky breaks. Warps and pulverizes without direct touch.
